title: Issues
description: Known bugs, missing capabilities, design debt, and open work items. Tracked with title/body (GitHub issue pattern), code location, package scope, priority, and resolution lifecycle.

body.description: Full detail and context for downstream composition

location.description: File path + line number, e.g. packages/pi-workflows/src/dag.ts:219

status.description: Issue lifecycle. Intentionally divergent from pi-context://schemas/status (which uses workflow-shaped todo/in_progress/blocked/complete/unknown); issues use issue-tracker semantics (open/resolved/deferred). Reconciliation.

priority.description: Issue priority. Intentionally divergent from pi-context://schemas/priority (which uses p- prefix for workflow-vocabulary fragility classification). Reconciliation.

package.description: Which monorepo package this issue touches (e.g. pi-workflows, pi-context, pi-behavior-monitors)

source.description: How this issue was created. Vocabulary $ref'd from pi-context://schemas/source.

resolved_by.description: Commit message or reference if resolved
